globalNews.title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
globalNews.summary: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.

globalNews.title: Sea drone rescues US army helicopter crew near Strait of Hormuz
globalNews.summary: An uncrewed vessel picked up two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down on Monday, US officials tells CBS News.

globalNews.title: Hundreds of aftershocks jolt Philippines as officials say death toll could rise
globalNews.summary: Dozens of people are dead and hundreds more injured following an earthquake in the country's south.

globalNews.title: 300 migrants bound for UK kidnapped and threatened with kidney removal
globalNews.summary: The Iraqi Kurds were captured by a militia who demanded a ransom of $5,000 (£3,700) per person.

globalNews.title: ICC suspends top prosecutor after investigating misconduct allegations
globalNews.summary: Karim Khan denies all allegations of sexual misconduct and his lawyers say he rejects the decision in the strongest terms.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin bottom? These four charts hint at BTC price dropping to $50K
cryptoNews.summary: A $50,000 Bitcoin price target remains in play despite BTC maintaining above $60,000 support for now, as multiple indicators warn the bottom may not be in.

cryptoNews.title: Blockchain researchers warn HTX sanctions may blur crypto risk signals
cryptoNews.summary: Researchers say broad HTX tainting could freeze legitimate users and make compliance tools less useful for tracing illicit funds.

cryptoNews.title: Privacy push as StarkWare and Sui move toward compliance-ready confidential transfers
cryptoNews.summary: StarkWare and Sui roll out confidential transfer systems as Zama boosts compliance efforts and Zcash’s Orchard bug highlights risks in shielded privacy models.

cryptoNews.title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
cryptoNews.summary: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin 'normal' 4-year cycle puts focus on $53K low before 2028 BTC price high
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin trader said that BTC price was approaching its cycle bottom "window" with the $53,000 cycle midpoint a potential buy-in level.

aiNews.title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams
aiNews.summary: Sandstone's Series A was led by Lightspeed Partners, with participation from Sequoia.

aiNews.title: Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week
aiNews.summary: Lovable says it has now surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue and its users are building businesses and replacing internal software.

aiNews.title: How an e-scooter founder raised $5 million to build space data centers
aiNews.summary: Orbital founder Euwyn Poon built 250,000 scooters at Spin. Now he wants to launch 10,000 space data centers.

aiNews.title: Why Apple’s slow-and-steady AI bet is starting to look pretty smart
aiNews.summary: Can Apple's new AI glow up put to bed accusations that it's losing an all-important industry race?

aiNews.title: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia, accusing it of ‘dual-pricing’ valuation tricks
aiNews.summary: Sequoia is just one of the top firms that sells same equity at two different prices.
